h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to ask for the reason behind the separation of the two numbers on the tile.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner repeats the same placement actions and questions throughout the dialogue without any breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new adaptive mechanism, repeating the same explanation.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn or subsequent tutor adaptation.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner repeats the same placement actions and questions throughout the dialogue without any breakthrough.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn or subsequent tutor adaptation.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new adaptive mechanism, repeating the same explanation.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not change their strategy or introduce a new adaptive mechanism, repeating the same explanation.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced by the tutor.
